title: Returns & Refunds
s1_p1: You may return any item purchased from the Sweevil store within 14 calendar days of receiving the order, provided that:
s1_li1: The item is in perfect condition, with no signs of use
s1_li2: The item is returned in its original packaging
s1_li3: Proof of purchase is provided (order confirmation email)
s2_p1: To start the return process, contact us at:
s2_p2: Please provide your order number, the items you wish to return, and the reason for the return. Once the return is confirmed, we will send you shipping instructions.
s3_p1: Return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility. We recommend using a tracked shipping service, as we are not liable for items lost during return transit.
s4_p1: After receiving and inspecting the returned item, we will process the refund within a maximum of 14 days. The refund will be issued via the same payment method used in the original purchase:
s4_li1: Credit/debit card (Stripe) — refunded to the card used
s4_li2: Debit card — refunded to the card used
s4_li3: MB Way — refunded to the associated phone number
s4_li4: Revolut — refunded to the Revolut account used
s5_p1: If you receive a defective or damaged item, contact us immediately (within 48 hours of receipt) with photos of the item and the packaging. In this case, return shipping costs will be covered by Sweevil and we will arrange a replacement or full refund, according to your preference.
s6_p1: If your order has not been delivered within the estimated timeframe, contact us at
s6_p2: so we can follow up with the carrier.
